languages.text:
You can't use consumbles manually.
While having {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Crippled Arm (Right){/g} throw a random grenade from inventory under yourself at the beggining of each turn.

traits.locale_text:

While having {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Crippled Arm (Right){/g} throw a random grenade from inventory under yourself at the beggining of each turn.

languages.text:
The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

traits.locale_text:
The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each turn, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each turn, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента не может использовать расходные предметы.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он бросает случайную экипированную гранату в текущую клетку.
languages.original_text:
The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента не может использовать расходные предметы.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он бросает случайную экипированную гранату в текущую клетку.

Обладатель аугмента не может использовать расходные предметы.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он бросает случайную экипированную гранату в текущую клетку.

languages.text:
El usuario no puede utilizar consumibles.
Mientras el usuario tenga el {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}brazo derecho lisiado{/g}, al comienzo de cada {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} arroja hacia la casilla actual una granada aleatoria que tenga equipada.
languages.original_text:
The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

traits.locale_text:
El usuario no puede utilizar consumibles.
Mientras el usuario tenga el {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}brazo derecho lisiado{/g}, al comienzo de cada {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} arroja hacia la casilla actual una granada aleatoria que tenga equipada.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer kann keine Verbrauchsobjekte einsetzen.
Hat der Nutzer zu Beginn eines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} einen {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}verkrüppelten rechten Arm{/g}, wirft er eine zufällige ausgerüstete Granate auf das aktuelle Feld.
languages.original_text:
The user cannot use consumables.

traits.locale_text:

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, sarf eşya kullanamaz.
Kullanıcı, {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}kötürüm sağ kola{/g} sahip olduğu sürece her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tur{/g} başlangıcında mevcut hücreye rastgele kuşanılmış bir bombayı fırlatır.
languages.original_text:
The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, sarf eşya kullanamaz.
Kullanıcı, {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}kötürüm sağ kola{/g} sahip olduğu sürece her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tur{/g} başlangıcında mevcut hücreye rastgele kuşanılmış bir bombayı fırlatır.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur ne peut pas se servir de consommables.
S'il souffre de {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Bras droit mutilé{/g}, il lance au début de chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} une grenade choisie au hasard dans son équipement sur la case qu'il occupe actuellement.
languages.original_text:

As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

languages.text:
使用者无法使用消耗品。
只要使用者{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右臂骨折{/g}，每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，便向当前格投掷一颗已装备的随机手雷。
languages.original_text:

As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.

traits.locale_text:

languages.text:
使用者は消耗品を使用できない。
使用者が{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}不自由な右腕{/g} を持っている限り、各{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターンの開始時{/g} に、ランダムに装備された手榴弾を1つ、現在のマスに投げる。
